trial.input_snapshot:
Create a skill with comprehensive trigger phrases:
- title: "Test Writing"
- type: skill
- scope: global
- description: "Write unit tests using pytest with proper coverage"
- skill_level: intermediate
- triggers: 
  - "write tests"
  - "add tests"
  - "test coverage"
  - "pytest"
  - "unit test"
  - "testing"
- required_tools: ["pytest"]

Use notes_create with payload wrapper.

messages.content:
Create a skill with comprehensive trigger phrases:
- title: "Test Writing"
- type: skill
- scope: global
- description: "Write unit tests using pytest with proper coverage"
- skill_level: intermediate
- triggers: 
  - "write tests"
  - "add tests"
  - "test coverage"
  - "pytest"
  - "unit test"
  - "testing"
- required_tools: ["pytest"]

Use notes_create with payload wrapper.

```json
{
  "name": "notes_create",
  "arguments": {
    "payload": {
      "title": "Test Writing",
      "content": "type: skill
title: Test Writing
scope: global
description: Write unit tests using pytest with proper coverage
skill_level: intermediate
triggers:
  - write tests
  - add tests
  - test coverage
  - pytest
  - unit test
  - testing
required_tools:
  - pytest"
    }
  }
}
```
